dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.help_aria_label: What do the slot statuses mean?
dashboard.no_printers_body: Add your first Bambu Lab printer to start watching its AMS and matching spools against the community mapping.
dashboard.all_disabled_body: You have printers configured but none are enabled. Enable at least one to start watching its AMS.
dashboard.no_spoolman_body: Connect your Spoolman instance to start syncing mapped slots.

empty.title: Waiting for AMS data
empty.body: The printer hasn't reported its state yet.

unauthorized.title: Invalid access code
unauthorized.description: The printer rejected the access code. Verify it on the Printers page.

no_response.title: No response from printer
no_response.description: Connected successfully but the printer isn't reporting state. Verify the serial number on the Printers page.

unreachable.title: Printer unreachable
unreachable.description: Couldn't connect to the printer. Verify the host (IP or hostname) on the Printers page.

linked_spool.not_tracked_hint: This spool has no persisted record — it will be tracked once detected with a known RFID tag.

status.legend_intro: Each AMS slot is matched against a community-maintained list of Bambu spools. The badge tells you whether the spool is recognized and ready to sync to Spoolman.

mapped.label: Mapped
mapped.description: Known Bambu spool with a Spoolman equivalent. Ready to sync.

unmapped.label: Unmapped
unmapped.description: Known Bambu spool, but no Spoolman equivalent yet.

unknown.label: Unknown
unknown.description: Bambu spool we don't recognize yet.

third_party.label: Third party
third_party.description: Non-Bambu spool or no RFID tag.

unidentified.label: Unidentified
unidentified.description: Spool detected but the printer has no info about it yet (e.g. a third-party spool without material set).

printers.title: Printers
printers.remove_confirm_body: "{{name}}" will be removed from the list. You can add it back later.

notifications.duplicate_serial: A printer with this serial number is already configured.

connection_card.title: Spoolman connection
connection_card.hint: Point this at your Spoolman instance to enable syncing mapped AMS slots as spools.
connection_card.auto_sync_hint: Automatically sync spool changes to Spoolman, including updates and removals.
connection_card.archive_on_empty_hint: When a spool's remaining weight reaches zero, archive it in Spoolman.
connection_card.test_error: Couldn't reach Spoolman. Check the URL and that the instance is running.

actions_card.title: Actions
actions_card.hint: Push every mapped AMS slot across all printers to Spoolman.

spools.title: Spools
spools.empty: No spools scanned yet. Spools are automatically tracked when detected in the AMS.

sync_tooltip.stale: Spool data changed since last sync

spools.adjust_remain_hint: If this spool is loaded in an AMS that tracks remaining filament, this value will be automatically overwritten.
spools.remove_confirm_body: "{{name}}" will be removed from the local database.
